description: Guide users through Solace Hub, Solace Browser, and Solace AGI, then help them create, run, schedule, and review domain apps.
author: Solace AGI

steps.description: Read Hub, OAuth3, sync, tunnel, and Browser status from localhost:8888.
Explain free local mode, BYOK, local CLI wrapper mode, and paid managed services without exposing trade-secret cloud prompts.
Create a custom app scaffold, open the app store, schedule an existing app, or route the user to support.
Keep actions reviewable with local evidence and cloud sync only when explicitly enabled.
